You are a player in a coding contest.
        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in C++ and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.
        Just only output code wrapped by ```, such as '```python
{your_code}
```'.
        The code will be abstracted from your reply. The code will immediately be test by the code evaluator.

__data__.output:
```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if
        N < 5 -> false;
        true ->
            solve_helper(Nums, 1, N - 3, N - 1)
    end.

solve_helper(Nums, P, MaxP, N) when P =< MaxP ->
    case solve_q(Nums, P, P + 1, N - 1, N) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_helper(Nums, P + 1, MaxP, N)
    end;
solve_helper(_, _, _, _) -> false.

solve_q(Nums, P, Q, MaxQ, N) when Q =< MaxQ ->
    case check_increasing(Nums, 1, P) andalso
         check_decreasing(Nums, P + 1, Q) andalso
         check_increasing(Nums, Q + 1, N - 1) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_q(Nums, P, Q + 1, MaxQ, N)
    end;
solve_q(_, _, _, _, _) -> false.

check_increasing(Nums, Start, End) when Start >= End -> true;
check_increasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    case lists:nth(Start + 1, Nums) > lists:nth(Start, Nums) of
        true -> check_increasing(Nums, Start + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.

check_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) when Start >= End -> true;
check_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    case lists:nth(Start + 1, Nums) < lists:nth(Start, Nums) of
        true -> check_decreasing(Nums, Start + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.
```

__data__.content:
```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if
        N < 5 -> false;
        true ->
            solve_helper(Nums, 1, N - 3, N - 1)
    end.

solve_helper(Nums, P, MaxP, N) when P =< MaxP ->
    case solve_q(Nums, P, P + 1, N - 1, N) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_helper(Nums, P + 1, MaxP, N)
    end;
solve_helper(_, _, _, _) -> false.

solve_q(Nums, P, Q, MaxQ, N) when Q =< MaxQ ->
    case check_increasing(Nums, 1, P) andalso
         check_decreasing(Nums, P + 1, Q) andalso
         check_increasing(Nums, Q + 1, N - 1) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_q(Nums, P, Q + 1, MaxQ, N)
    end;
solve_q(_, _, _, _, _) -> false.

check_increasing(Nums, Start, End) when Start >= End -> true;
check_increasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    case lists:nth(Start + 1, Nums) > lists:nth(Start, Nums) of
        true -> check_increasing(Nums, Start + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.

check_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) when Start >= End -> true;
check_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    case lists:nth(Start + 1, Nums) < lists:nth(Start, Nums) of
        true -> check_decreasing(Nums, Start + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.
```

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

如果存在索引 `0 < p < q < n − 1`，使得数组满足以下条件，则称其为 **三段式数组（trionic）**：

- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

如果 `nums` 是三段式数组，返回 `true`；否则，返回 `false`。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,3,5,4,2,6]

**输出:** true

**解释:**

选择 `p = 2`, `q = 4`：

- `nums[0...2] = [1, 3, 5]` 严格递增 (`1 < 3 < 5`)。
- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

 

**提示:**

- `3 <= n <= 100`
- `-1000 <= nums[i] <= 1000`

======
You must strictly follow this signature:
bool solve(std::vector<long long> nums)

Target language: C++

Requirements:
1. You may include auxiliary/helper code before or after the required signature.
2. All import/include statements (e.g., `import` in Python, `#include` in C/C++) must be placed at the very top of the file.

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if
        N < 5 -> false;
        true ->
            solve_helper(Nums, 1, N - 3, N - 1)
    end.

solve_helper(Nums, P, MaxP, N) when P =< MaxP ->
    case solve_q(Nums, P, P + 1, N - 1, N) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_helper(Nums, P + 1, MaxP, N)
    end;
solve_helper(_, _, _, _) -> false.

solve_q(Nums, P, Q, MaxQ, N) when Q =< MaxQ ->
    case is_increasing(Nums, 0, P) andalso 
         is_decreasing(Nums, P, Q) andalso 
         is_increasing(Nums, Q, N - 1) of
        true -> true;
        false -> solve_q(Nums, P, Q + 1, MaxQ, N)
    end;
solve_q(_, _, _, _, _) -> false.

is_increasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_increasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_increasing_helper(Nums, I, End) when I =< End ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) > lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_increasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end;
is_increasing_helper(_, _, _) -> true.

is_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_decreasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I, End) when I =< End ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) < lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end;
is_decreasing_helper(_, _, _) -> true.
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if 
        N < 5 -> false;
        true -> check_trionic(Nums, N)
    end.

check_trionic(Nums, N) ->
    check_p_q(Nums, 1, N - 3, N).

check_p_q(_, P, QMax, _) when P >= QMax -> false;
check_p_q(Nums, P, QMax, N) ->
    case check_q(Nums, P, P + 1, QMax, N) of
        true -> true;
        false -> check_p_q(Nums, P + 1, QMax, N)
    end.

check_q(_, _, Q, QMax, _) when Q >= QMax -> false;
check_q(Nums, P, Q, QMax, N) ->
    case is_increasing(Nums, 0, P) andalso 
         is_decreasing(Nums, P, Q) andalso 
         is_increasing(Nums, Q, N - 1) of
        true -> true;
        false -> check_q(Nums, P, Q + 1, QMax, N)
    end.

is_increasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_increasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_increasing_helper(_, I, End) when I > End -> true;
is_increasing_helper(Nums, I, End) ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) > lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_increasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.

is_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_decreasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_decreasing_helper(_, I, End) when I > End -> true;
is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I, End) ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) < lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.
```

solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if 
        N < 5 -> false;
        true -> check_trionic(Nums, N)
    end.

check_trionic(Nums, N) ->
    check_p_q(Nums, 1, N - 3, N).

check_p_q(_, P, QMax, _) when P >= QMax -> false;
check_p_q(Nums, P, QMax, N) ->
    case check_q(Nums, P, P + 1, QMax, N) of
        true -> true;
        false -> check_p_q(Nums, P + 1, QMax, N)
    end.

check_q(_, _, Q, QMax, _) when Q >= QMax -> false;
check_q(Nums, P, Q, QMax, N) ->
    case is_increasing(Nums, 0, P) andalso 
         is_decreasing(Nums, P, Q) andalso 
         is_increasing(Nums, Q, N - 1) of
        true -> true;
        false -> check_q(Nums, P, Q + 1, QMax, N)
    end.

is_increasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_increasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_increasing_helper(_, I, End) when I > End -> true;
is_increasing_helper(Nums, I, End) ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) > lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_increasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.

is_decreasing(Nums, Start, End) ->
    is_decreasing_helper(Nums, Start + 1, End).

is_decreasing_helper(_, I, End) when I > End -> true;
is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I, End) ->
    case lists:nth(I, Nums) < lists:nth(I - 1, Nums) of
        true -> is_decreasing_helper(Nums, I + 1, End);
        false -> false
    end.
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    case length(Nums) < 5 of
        true -> false;
        false -> check_trionic(Nums)
    end.

check_trionic(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    PQs = [{P, Q} || P <- lists:seq(1, N - 4), Q <- lists:seq(P + 1, N - 2)],
    lists:any(fun({P, Q}) ->
        is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, 1, P + 1)) andalso
        is_decreasing(lists:sublist(Nums, P + 1, Q - P + 1)) andalso
        is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Q + 1, N - Q))
    end, PQs).

is_increasing([_]) -> true;
is_increasing([X, Y | Rest]) ->
    X < Y andalso is_increasing([Y | Rest]).

is_decreasing([_]) -> true;
is_decreasing([X, Y | Rest]) ->
    X > Y andalso is_decreasing([Y | Rest]).
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    case length(Nums) < 5 of
        true -> false;
        false -> check_trionic(Nums)
    end.

check_trionic(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    PQs = [{P, Q} || P <- lists:seq(1, N - 4), Q <- lists:seq(P + 1, N - 2)],
    lists:any(fun({P, Q}) ->
        is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, 1, P + 1)) andalso
        is_decreasing(lists:sublist(Nums, P + 1, Q - P + 1)) andalso
        is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Q + 1, N - Q))
    end, PQs).

is_increasing([_]) -> true;
is_increasing([X, Y | Rest]) ->
    X < Y andalso is_increasing([Y | Rest]).

is_decreasing([_]) -> true;
is_decreasing([X, Y | Rest]) ->
    X > Y andalso is_decreasing([Y | Rest]).
```

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

如果存在索引 `0 < p < q < n − 1`，使得数组满足以下条件，则称其为 **三段式数组（trionic）**：

- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

如果 `nums` 是三段式数组，返回 `true`；否则，返回 `false`。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,3,5,4,2,6]

**输出:** true

**解释:**

选择 `p = 2`, `q = 4`：

- `nums[0...2] = [1, 3, 5]` 严格递增 (`1 < 3 < 5`)。
- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

 

**提示:**

- `3 <= n <= 100`
- `-1000 <= nums[i] <= 1000`
